zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Echingham於1394年出生在英國英格蘭素可艾欽加姆時，她的父親Sir William II Echyngham44歲，母親Alice Battisford23歲。她於大約1415年與Sir Thomas Hoo結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1464年7月19日在英國素可艾欽加姆享年70歲，埋葬在英國素可阿爾丁格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Echingham于1394年出生在英国英格兰素可艾欽加姆时，她的父亲Sir William II Echyngham44岁，母亲Alice Battisford23岁。她于大约1415年与Sir Thomas Hoo结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1464年7月19日在英国素可艾欽加姆享年70岁，埋葬在英国素可阿爾丁格利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Echingham was born in 1394, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William II Echyngham, was 44 and her mother, Alice Battisford, was 23. She married Sir Thomas Hoo about 1415. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 19 July 1464, in Etchingham, Sussex, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Ardingly, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Echingham est née en 1394, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William II Echyngham, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice Battisford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Hoo environ 1415. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 19 juillet 1464, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Ardingly, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Echingham 1394 in Etchingham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William II Echyngham 44 und ihre Mutter Alice Battisford 23. Sie hat um 1415 Sir Thomas Hoo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 19. Juli 1464 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Etchingham, Sussex, England und wurde in Ardingly, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Echingham è nata il nel 1394 nel Etchingham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William II Echyngham, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Alice Battisford, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Hoo circa 1415. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 19 luglio 1464, nel Etchingham, Sussex, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Ardingly, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Echinghamが1394年にイギリスイギリススセックスエトチンガムで生まれた時，父Sir William II Echynghamは44歳，母Alice Battisfordは23歳であった。約1415年にSir Thomas Hooと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1464年7月19日にイギリススセックスエトチンガムで70歳で死去し，イギリススセックスアルディングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Echingham(이)가 1394년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 트친그함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William II Echyngham(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Battisford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1415년 Sir Thomas Hoo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 7월 19일 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 아딩리에 묻혔다.

mn.Postling, Kent, England: Postling, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Echingham nasceu em 1394, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William II Echyngham, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice Battisford, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Hoo aproximadamente 1415. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 19 de julho de 1464, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Echingham родилась в 1394 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William II Echyngham было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Battisford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Hoo около 1415 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 19 июля 1464 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности ардингли, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Echingham nació en 1394, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William II Echyngham, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice Battisford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Hoo aproximadamente 1415. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 19 de julio de 1464, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra.
